days.title: Pune to Mumbai - Gateway & History
days.subtitle: Train journey and iconic monuments
highlights: Scenic train ride from Pune to Mumbai
localTips: Book Deccan Queen or Shatabdi Express in advance
Gateway of India best visited at golden hour
Carry water bottles for kids during train journey
Use auto-rickshaw from station to hotel

days.title: Mumbai Heritage & Cuisine
days.subtitle: Markets, museums, and family-friendly food tour

timeline.title: Breakfast at Hotel
timeline.detail: Start your day with a hearty breakfast at Hotel Godwin. Enjoy local Mumbai specialties and fresh fruits to fuel up for the day ahead.
timeline.mapQuery: Hotel Godwin, Near CST, Mumbai, India

timeline.title: Hotel Check-out
timeline.detail: Complete checkout procedures and store luggage with the hotel for later pickup before evening train departure.
timeline.mapQuery: Hotel Godwin, Near CST, Mumbai, India

timeline.title: CST Heritage Guided Tour
timeline.detail: Begin a guided heritage tour of Chhatrapati Shivaji Terminus (CST), exploring the stunning Victorian Gothic architecture and learning about Mumbai's railway history. Perfect for train enthusiasts in the family.
timeline.mapQuery: Chhatrapati Shivaji Terminus, Fort, Mumbai, India

timeline.title: Crawford Market (Mahatma Jyotiba Phule Market)
timeline.detail: Explore the vibrant Crawford Market with kids, discovering fresh produce, spices, and local crafts. Enjoy the bustling atmosphere and interact with friendly vendors selling traditional items.
timeline.mapQuery: Crawford Market (Mahatma Jyotiba Phule Market), Fort, Mumbai, India

timeline.title: Traditional Maharashtrian Lunch
timeline.detail: Enjoy an authentic family lunch featuring traditional Maharashtrian cuisine. Try local favorites like puran poli, misal pav, and fresh vegetable curries at a well-known restaurant near the market.
timeline.mapQuery: Aayi Dini Cha Dhaba, Fort, Mumbai, India

timeline.title: Prince of Wales Museum Visit
timeline.detail: Spend time at this kid-friendly museum showcasing Indian art, weapons, and historical artifacts. Engaging exhibits perfect for curious families interested in Indian heritage.
timeline.mapQuery: Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj Vastu Sangrahalaya, Fort, Mumbai, India

timeline.title: Snack Break & Local Sweets
timeline.detail: Take a break at a local sweet shop or café. Try Mumbai favorites like vada pav, chikhalwali, or fresh sugarcane juice while kids enjoy traditional Indian sweets.

timeline.title: Hotel Godwin - Luggage Pickup & Freshen Up
timeline.detail: Return to Hotel Godwin to collect stored luggage, freshen up, and prepare for the evening train journey back to Pune.
timeline.mapQuery: Hotel Godwin, Near CST, Mumbai, India

timeline.title: Transfer to CST Station
timeline.detail: Travel by taxi or auto-rickshaw from hotel to Chhatrapati Shivaji Terminus for your evening train departure. Allow time for ticket checking and platform navigation with kids.
timeline.mapQuery: Chhatrapati Shivaji Terminus, Fort, Mumbai, India

timeline.title: Evening Train to Pune
timeline.detail: Board the train back to Pune with your family. Settle in for the 3-hour journey, relax, and reflect on the day's adventures exploring Mumbai's heritage and cuisine.
timeline.mapQuery: Chhatrapati Shivaji Terminus to Pune Junction, India

highlights: Return to Pune by evening train
localTips: CST best visited early morning to avoid crowds
Crawford Market excellent for fresh produce and spices
Hire local guide for train station history
Book return train ticket same day
Wear comfortable shoes for market walk

budget.note: 2 passengers, AC chair car, Deccan Queen/Shatabdi
CST heritage tour, Crawford Market, Gateway viewing

urgent.label: Book train tickets (Deccan Queen/Shatabdi Express)
urgent.note: Popular route, book 2-4 weeks in advance for family seats

urgent.label: Book hotel near CST
urgent.note: Premium locations book up fast, confirm 1 week prior
